Hi, I'm Siddharth

A passionate Web Developer & Cybersecurity Enthusiast. I build modern, responsive websites and focus on secure applications.

About Me

Motivated fresher with foundational knowledge in web development and cybersecurity. Skilled in building responsive websites and understanding security best practices to protect applications from common threats. Open to opportunities to apply my skills and grow as a professional.

C, Java, Python SQL, MongoDB HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js Linux, Windows Team Collaboration, Problem-Solving

7th Heaven (Restaurant Website)

Full-stack restaurant app with authentication, menu browsing, cart, and MongoDB backend.

Auction Hub (Ongoing)

Responsive auction platform with live countdowns, secure login, and bid tracking.
